campaign.title: Acme Skincare Co — Gentle Cleanser Education Campaign

companyBrain.brandVoice: Acme Skincare Co speaks with calm confidence — science-backed, approachable, never clinical.
companyBrain.personas: Primary: mindful skincare beginners. Secondary: ingredient-aware enthusiasts upgrading from harsh cleansers.
companyBrain.messaging: Simple rituals, visible results. Gentle formulas that respect the skin barrier.

article.title: 10 Simple Ways to Add a Gentle Cleanser to Your Routine
article.summary: A practical guide showing how a gentle cleanser fits morning and evening rituals without disrupting sensitive skin.

copy.headline: 10 Simple Ways to Add a Gentle Cleanser to Your Routine
copy.subheadline: Barrier-friendly cleansing for calm, confident skin — every day.
copy.socialCaption: Small ritual, big difference. Here are 10 simple ways to introduce a gentle cleanser without overcomplicating your routine.
copy.newsletterIntro: This month we are focusing on gentle cleansing — the foundation of every effective skincare routine.

instagramCarousel.concept: Step-by-step routine cards with product flat-lay photography
instagramCarousel.notes: Use soft natural light, muted earth tones, minimal text per slide

facebook.concept: Hero product with headline overlay and subtle texture background
facebook.notes: Keep headline under 8 words for mobile legibility

pinterest.notes: Include numbered steps and brand logo lockup at base

stories.concept: 3-frame story: hook → tip highlight → CTA swipe-up
stories.notes: Use motion-safe safe zones; CTA on final frame only

newsletterHeader.concept: Wide banner with product trio and campaign title
newsletterHeader.notes: Optimise for dark and light email clients
